system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You touch a little known meridian along the back causing the person to convulse. Make an Arm Strike roll against Parry. On a Success the target takes -1d10 to all Combat and Physical Skills due to trembling for one round. On a Total Success the effect lasts one extra round per Rank of Dianxue. Cathartic: When used Cathartically this sets off a reaction within the body that lasts until the person is able to control it. The person shakes more with each passing round, taking an increasing -1d10 penalty to Combat and Physical Skills. This only ends if they make a successful Meditation roll against your initial Arm Strike roll.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: -1d10 to all Combat and Physical Skills for 1 round
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: -1d10 to all Combat and Physical Skills for 1 round plus 1 round per Rank of Dianxue
system.catharticTargetEffects: Increasing -1d10 Combat and Physical Skill penalty each round until target succeeds at Meditation against original Arm Strike result
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically this sets off a reaction within the body that lasts until the person is able to control it. The person shakes more with each passing round, taking an increasing -1d10 penalty to Combat and Physical Skills. This only ends if they make a successful Meditation roll against your initial Arm Strike roll.
